sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, independent_var DOUBLE, dependent_var DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, independent_var, dependent_var) VALUES (1, 10.0, 20.0), (2, 15.0, 25.0), (3, 20.0, 30.0);
UPDATE test_data SET dependent_var = dependent_var + 5 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, regr_sxx(dependent_var, independent_var) AS regression_slope FROM test_data;
SELECT regr_sxx(dependent_var, independent_var) AS regression_slope FROM test_data WHERE independent_var > 0;
